title: 10 health benefits of Alchemilla mollis (lady's mantle)
intro: Alchemilla mollis has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. These medicinal properties can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations. For instance, drinking tea made from the plant's leaves can soothe digestive problems and reduce bloating, while applying a topical cream may ease acne and minor wounds. Additionally, lady's mantle has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections, promoting healthy bladder function and reducing discomfort.
